raw_response:
I agree with the final synthesis but would add another point to support option C. Children may also accidentally bite themselves while trying to soothe sore spots created by the extraction wound, further emphasizing the need for careful monitoring and instructions post-operation. Therefore, my additional rationale aligns well with choosing C over the others.

Answer Choice: C.
